entries.rationale: lower.ts line 512 contains a TemplateExpression whose ConditionalExpression spans are not currently decomposable by the shave pipeline. The file was added in ce0dbba (closes #783). This is a known shave-pipeline limitation (TemplateExpression + conditional spans), not a bug in lower.ts. Tracked for future shave-pipeline work; documented here per DEC-V2-BOOT-EXPECTED-FAILURES-001.
